unitTests

Class QueueTest

  • java.lang.Object
    • unitTests.QueueTest

  • public class QueueTest
extends java.lang.Object
    Version:
    3.3 Nov 8, 2024 Class Description: Test for DLL-based implementation of the QueueADT defined in the CPRG 304 Assignment 2.
    Author:
    kitty, maryam

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      QueueTest() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void setUp()
      Initializes a MyQueue instance and five Integer instances before each test.
      void tearDown()
      Cleans up instances used after each test.
      void testConstructor()
      Test method for MyQueue.MyQueue() to create a queue.
      void testContains_Found()
      Test method for MyQueue.contains(java.lang.Object) to return true when item is found.
      void testContains_NotFound()
      Test method for MyQueue.contains(java.lang.Object) to return true when item is not found.
      void testContains_NullPointerException()
      Test method for MyQueue.contains(java.lang.Object) to throw NullPointerException when null is passed.
      void testDequeue_Empty()
      Test method for MyQueue.dequeue() to throw EmptyQueueException when removing from an empty queue.
      void testDequeue_Front()
      Test method for MyQueue.dequeue() to remove the first item in the queue.
      void testDequeueAll_Size()
      Test method for MyQueue.dequeueAll() to clear the queue.
      void testEnqueue_NullPointerException()
      Test method for MyQueue.enqueue(java.lang.Object) to throw a NullPointerException when a null is passed.
      void testEnqueue()
      Test method for MyQueue.enqueue(java.lang.Object).
      void testEquals_False()
      Test method for MyQueue.equals(utilities.QueueADT) to return false when two queues are not equal.
      void testEquals_True()
      Test method for MyQueue.equals(utilities.QueueADT) to return true when two queues are equal.
      void testIsEmpty_False()
      Test method for MyQueue.isEmpty() to return false when the queue is not empty.
      void testIsEmpty_True()
      Test method for MyQueue.isEmpty() to return true when queue is empty.
      void testIsFull()
      Test method for MyQueue.isFull() to return false.
      void testIterator_EmptyQ()
      Test method for MyQueue.iterator() to return and iterator when the queue is empty.
      void testIterator()
      Test method for MyQueue.iterator() to return and iterator to iterate over the items of the queue from head to tail.
      void testPeek_Empty()
      Test method for MyQueue.peek() to throw EmptyQueueException when queue is empty.
      void testPeek_First()
      Test method for MyQueue.peek() to return the first item in the queue.
      void testSearch_Found()
      Test method for MyQueue.search(java.lang.Object) to return the index of the item when the item exists.
      void testSearch_NotFound()
      Test method for MyQueue.search(java.lang.Object) to return the index of the item when the item doesn't exist.
      void testSize_AddMany()
      Test method for QueueADT.size() to return the size of the queue when the queue has multiple items.
      void testSize_AddOneToEmpty()
      Test method for QueueADT.size() to return the size of the queue when the queue has one item.
      void testToArray()
      Test method for MyQueue.toArray() to return an Object array storing all items in the queue from head to first.
      void testToArrayEArray_InsufficientArray()
      Test method for implementations.MyQueue#toArray(E[]) to return an array storing all items in the queue from head to first when the array passed has insufficient length.
      void testToArrayEArray_SufficientArray()
      Test method for implementations.MyQueue#toArray(E[]) to return an array storing all items in the queue from head to first when the array passed has sufficient length.
      void testToArrayNullArray()
      Test method for implementations.MyQueue#toArray(E[]) to throw NullPointerException when a null is passed.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • QueueTest

        public QueueTest()

    • Method Detail

      • setUp

        public void setUp()
           throws java.lang.Exception
        Initializes a MyQueue instance and five Integer instances before each test.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception

      • tearDown

        public void tearDown()
              throws java.lang.Exception
        Cleans up instances used after each test.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception

      • testConstructor

        public void testConstructor()
        Test method for MyQueue.MyQueue() to create a queue.

      • testDequeueAll_Size

        public void testDequeueAll_Size()
        Test method for MyQueue.dequeueAll() to clear the queue.

      • testEquals_True

        public void testEquals_True()
        Test method for MyQueue.equals(utilities.QueueADT) to return true when two queues are equal.

      • testEquals_False

        public void testEquals_False()
                      throws EmptyQueueException
        Test method for MyQueue.equals(utilities.QueueADT) to return false when two queues are not equal.
        Throws:
        EmptyQueueException

      • testIsEmpty_True

        public void testIsEmpty_True()
        Test method for MyQueue.isEmpty() to return true when queue is empty.

      • testIsEmpty_False

        public void testIsEmpty_False()
        Test method for MyQueue.isEmpty() to return false when the queue is not empty.

      • testIterator

        public void testIterator()
        Test method for MyQueue.iterator() to return and iterator to iterate over the items of the queue from head to tail.

      • testIterator_EmptyQ

        public void testIterator_EmptyQ()
        Test method for MyQueue.iterator() to return and iterator when the queue is empty.

      • testPeek_First

        public void testPeek_First()
                    throws EmptyQueueException
        Test method for MyQueue.peek() to return the first item in the queue.
        Throws:
        EmptyQueueException

      • testPeek_Empty

        public void testPeek_Empty()
        Test method for MyQueue.peek() to throw EmptyQueueException when queue is empty.

      • testDequeue_Front

        public void testDequeue_Front()
                       throws EmptyQueueException
        Test method for MyQueue.dequeue() to remove the first item in the queue.
        Throws:
        EmptyQueueException

      • testDequeue_Empty

        public void testDequeue_Empty()
        Test method for MyQueue.dequeue() to throw EmptyQueueException when removing from an empty queue.

      • testEnqueue

        public void testEnqueue()
                 throws EmptyQueueException
        Test method for MyQueue.enqueue(java.lang.Object). to enqueue multiple items to the queue.
        Throws:
        EmptyQueueException

      • testEnqueue_NullPointerException

        public void testEnqueue_NullPointerException()
        Test method for MyQueue.enqueue(java.lang.Object) to throw a NullPointerException when a null is passed.

      • testSize_AddOneToEmpty

        public void testSize_AddOneToEmpty()
        Test method for QueueADT.size() to return the size of the queue when the queue has one item.

      • testSize_AddMany

        public void testSize_AddMany()
        Test method for QueueADT.size() to return the size of the queue when the queue has multiple items.

      • testToArray

        public void testToArray()
        Test method for MyQueue.toArray() to return an Object array storing all items in the queue from head to first.

      • testToArrayEArray_SufficientArray

        public void testToArrayEArray_SufficientArray()
        Test method for implementations.MyQueue#toArray(E[]) to return an array storing all items in the queue from head to first when the array passed has sufficient length.

      • testToArrayEArray_InsufficientArray

        public void testToArrayEArray_InsufficientArray()
        Test method for implementations.MyQueue#toArray(E[]) to return an array storing all items in the queue from head to first when the array passed has insufficient length.

      • testToArrayNullArray

        public void testToArrayNullArray()
        Test method for implementations.MyQueue#toArray(E[]) to throw NullPointerException when a null is passed.

      • testIsFull

        public void testIsFull()
        Test method for MyQueue.isFull() to return false.

      • testContains_Found

        public void testContains_Found()
        Test method for MyQueue.contains(java.lang.Object) to return true when item is found.

      • testContains_NotFound

        public void testContains_NotFound()
        Test method for MyQueue.contains(java.lang.Object) to return true when item is not found.

      • testContains_NullPointerException

        public void testContains_NullPointerException()
        Test method for MyQueue.contains(java.lang.Object) to throw NullPointerException when null is passed.

      • testSearch_Found

        public void testSearch_Found()
        Test method for MyQueue.search(java.lang.Object) to return the index of the item when the item exists.

      • testSearch_NotFound

        public void testSearch_NotFound()
        Test method for MyQueue.search(java.lang.Object) to return the index of the item when the item doesn't exist.
